summary: ANDROID 🟥 | CCL | CCL during call is blinking for blocking settings
scenario: CCL (Call Control Layer) settings blink during an active call instead of being locked/blocked
description_clean: During a call, the CCL (Call Control Layer) settings are blinking instead of being locked/blocked as expected. Steps: Go to CCL and start a call. Observed: CCL settings blink. Expected: CCL settings should be locked.
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. Locate the Call Control Layer (CCL) settings within the device settings menu.
5. Initiate a phone call from the connected device (e.g., press the Call button or dial from the phone).
6. While the call is active, observe the CCL settings in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
expected: The CCL settings should be locked/blocked and not interactive during an active call.
actual: The CCL settings are blinking instead of being locked/blocked during an active call.
